name: DataByteSprites Configuration Chart
description: Canonical configuration registry and matchup foundation. Every sprite has exactly one alignment and one or two configurations. Alignment and configuration are separate systems. Matchups remain pending until canon balance rules are authored.

alignments.name: Pristine
alignments.description: Stable, intact, or naturally compiled sprite data.

alignments.name: Stained
alignments.description: Corrupted, altered, or unstable sprite data.

alignments.name: Null
alignments.description: Null-rewritten data outside normal Pristine and Stained behavior.

alignmentModel.notes: Alignment forms may be separate species within the same family rather than palette variants. The Leo family establishes this pattern.

configurationModel.secondaryUnlock: A secondary configuration may appear through a Version Upgrade or alternate species design.
configurationModel.electricNamingRule: Voltricity is the canonical electrical configuration. Electric is deprecated and must not be used as a separate configuration.

configurations.name: Mystic
configurations.theme: Magic, arcane code, anomalous ritual data.

configurations.name: Voltricity
configurations.theme: Electricity, lightning, charge, and electrical energy.

configurations.name: Acoustic
configurations.theme: Sound, vibration, voice, frequency, and audio data.

configurations.name: Torrent
configurations.theme: Water, fluid motion, currents, streams, and high-volume data flow.

configurations.name: Thermal
configurations.theme: Heat, combustion, radiation, and temperature pressure.

configurations.name: Organic
configurations.theme: Life, growth, biological systems, plants, fungi, and natural regeneration.

configurations.name: Malware
configurations.theme: Malicious software, infection, exploitation, and hostile code.

configurations.name: Analog
configurations.theme: Mechanical media, continuous signals, legacy devices, and pre-digital technology.

configurations.name: Quantum
configurations.theme: Probability, superposition, entanglement, and subatomic computation.

configurations.name: Financial
configurations.theme: Currency, markets, debt, value, banking, and economic systems.

configurations.name: Temporal
configurations.theme: Time, timing, delay, acceleration, memory order, and chronology.

configurations.name: Spam
configurations.theme: Repetition, unwanted messages, flooding, clutter, and communication overload.

configurations.name: Cryo
configurations.theme: Cold, freezing, suspended processes, and preservation.

configurations.name: Alloy
configurations.theme: Metal, machines, armor, construction, and engineered materials.

configurations.name: Spectral
configurations.theme: Digital echoes, deleted traces, ghosts, absence, and residual data.

configurations.name: Cipher
configurations.theme: Encryption, decoding, secrecy, authentication, and protected information.

configurations.name: Neural
configurations.theme: Artificial intelligence, learning, thought, prediction, and adaptive networks.

configurations.name: Celestial
configurations.theme: Stars, space, satellites, cosmic systems, and constellations.

configurations.name: Aether
configurations.theme: Ambient energy, invisible fields, atmosphere, and higher-order signal forces.

configurations.name: Seismic
configurations.theme: Earth, stone, soil, crystal, tectonic force, and vibration through solid matter.

rules.notes: Migrated from the obsolete Electric/Voltricity split. Voltricity is the only electrical configuration; final matchup values are intentionally not inferred.

migrationNotes: Aquatic and Water concepts migrate to Torrent where appropriate.
Earth and ground concepts migrate to Seismic rather than Organic.
Metal and robotic construction concepts migrate to Alloy.
Legacy terms may remain as move tags, visual themes, mechanics, or descriptive metadata, but not as canonical configurations unless promoted later.
